title: ProcScript instruction clrmess
text: ProcScript instruction clrmess Determine whether the clrmess ProcScript instruction is enabled. Representation Description Enabled Enable the clrmess ProcScript statement in your ProcScript. Disabled Disable the clrmess ProcScript statement in your ProcScript. Description The clrmess ProcScript statement clears all messages from the application's message frame. During debugging, this is usually undesirable, so the default is to disable it. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
